name: KUSTOM ENTERTAINMENT, INC.
business: The company operates through two reportable segments: Video Solutions, which develops, manufactures, and sells digital video imaging and storage products, disinfectant, and safety products for law enforcement, security, and commercial applications; and Entertainment, which operates a secondary ticketing platform (TicketSmarter.com) and produces/promotes live events.

exposures.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2022, Digital Ally released the EVO Fleet, offering a full-featured solution utilizing the latest in telematics technology, including immediate driver-assist feedback by recognizing pedestrians, distracted or drowsy driving, and lane shifting.

catalysts.event: Name change to Kustom Entertainment, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On January 8, 2026, the Company amended its Articles of Incorporation to change its corporate name from Digital Ally, Inc. to Kustom Entertainment, Inc.

catalysts.event: Artist performance agreement for 2026 Country Stampede music festival
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, Kustom 440, Inc. entered into a non-cancellable artist performance agreement for the 2026 Country Stampede music festival with aggregate payment obligations totaling $750,000, payable in installments of $187,500 upon execution, $187,500 due no later than May 27, 2026, and $375,000 payable following the performance.
